title: stachys alpina
intro: Stachys alpina, also known as alpine betony, is a perennial flowering plant in the mint family native to the European mountains. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and calm digestive issues. The health benefits of Stachys alpina include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Stachys alpina can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation, boost the immune system, and support overall well-being.
